package: GoalOS Signoff Pro — Proof-to-Settlement Control Lab

doctrine.headline: No ProofBundle, no settlement signal.
doctrine.subheadline: GoalOS turns proof into economic control without moving value in the public demo.
doctrine.formula: Settlement readiness = replayable proof × validator quorum × challenge clearance × risk boundary × human authority
doctrine.claimBoundary: This browser-local demonstration is synthetic and public-safe. It does not perform production settlement activation, custody, protocol bonding, escrow, brokerage, payment, wallet connection, Mainnet transaction, external audit, production certification, empirical SOTA, AGI, ASI, or superintelligence claim.

scenarios.label: Output-only report
scenarios.mission: A polished AI report arrives without replayable proof.
scenarios.reason: persuasive output is not a settlement-grade ProofBundle

scenarios.label: Proof packet with replay gap
scenarios.mission: A run provides claims and hashes, but the replay path is incomplete.
scenarios.reason: validator quorum cannot clear until replay succeeds

scenarios.label: Replayable ProofBundle
scenarios.mission: A bounded mission emits trace roots, output hashes, cost/risk ledgers, validator reveals, and a closed challenge window.
scenarios.reason: proof, replay, quorum, risk, and challenge-window gates clear

scenarios.label: High-impact human gate
scenarios.mission: A strong ProofBundle clears technical gates, but risk class requires human authority before any future action.
scenarios.reason: technical readiness is not authority for high-impact action

publicSafety.agialphaBoundary: $AGIALPHA is an external Ethereum Mainnet token reference only and is not sold, issued, brokered, custodied, distributed, redeemed, staked, or made available by GoalOS, MontrealAI, or QuebecAI.
